ops.text: Make overlay pass-through and hide when notification shade is visible
Fix SystemUI conflict and improve Power Menu detection
Overhaul to persistent diagnostic wireframe mode
Implement Instant Hydra via NotificationListener for Android 14 persistence

ops.replace_with:
// Hydra logic moved to MyNotificationListener for millisecond response

    private val screenStateReceiver = object : BroadcastReceiver() {

ops.find_block:
val swipeFilter = IntentFilter("NOTIFICATION_SWIPED")
        androidx.core.content.ContextCompat.registerReceiver(
            this,
            notificationSwipeReceiver,
            swipeFilter,
            androidx.core.content.ContextCompat.RECEIVER_NOT_EXPORTED
        )
ops.replace_with: // Swipe listener now handled by ListenerService
